sa.desc: Solves defined problems using established patterns. Standard Atlas sizing, architecture docs, success criteria.

sr.desc: Solves complex multi-domain problems (database + pipeline + compliance). Designs integrated data platforms.

adv.desc: Solves novel problems with no existing pattern. Invents architectures. Reviews Senior SA work formally.

pri.desc: Industrialises solutions. Approaches become org-wide best practices. Influences product roadmap.

sa.desc: Owns standard PoVs end-to-end. Builds trust with developer and architect audiences.

sr.desc: Leads complex PoVs. Expert in ≥1 advanced domain (Vector Search, Perf Tuning, Stream Processing).

adv.desc: Advises CTOs on 3-year architectural strategy. Regional SME. Unblocks complex deals for other SAs.

pri.desc: Trusted advisor to technical executives. Bridge between field and Product/Engineering.

sa.desc: Completes all required training on time. Integrates feedback. Tracks competitor offerings.

sr.desc: Learns beyond the syllabus. External research, certifications. Shares insights proactively with team.

adv.desc: SME in ≥1 domain or vertical. Runs structured coaching for peers. Sets the team's learning agenda.

pri.desc: Champions org-wide learning. Publishes externally. MongoDB's reputation in the domain is partly yours.

sa.desc: Connects features to business outcomes. Basic TCO messaging. Understands deal stages.

sr.desc: Builds ROI/TCO models to win competitive deals. Challenges AE constructively on scope and priority.

adv.desc: Leads C-suite strategy conversations. Positions MongoDB as long-term strategic partner.

pri.desc: Invents net-new revenue approaches. Fixes systemic commercial gaps across verticals.

sa.desc: Delivers standard demos and presentations. Handles some objections live. Creates recap docs.

sr.desc: Builds custom narratives from scratch. Presents at .locals. Owns C-1 stakeholder communication.

adv.desc: Persuades C-suite and MD-level audiences. Presents at global events. Mentors SAs on storytelling.

pri.desc: Keynotes premier conferences. Builds communication frameworks the whole SA org adopts.

sa.desc: Executes engagement plans with AE. Builds initial customer credibility. Closes smaller deals.

sr.desc: Builds account-level champion relationships. Neutralises detractors. Mentors new SA joiners.
sr.quant: SA buddy to 1–2 new joiners / year

adv.desc: Orchestrates Tier 1 accounts. Challenges VPs and Directors. Unblocks 3–6 deals / year for others.

pri.desc: C-suite trust across multiple accounts. Cross-regional scope (AMER/EMEA/APAC). Shapes org culture.

sa.desc: Contributes internal notes and insights. Proactive mentee. Asks questions that improve team outcomes.

sr.desc: Creates reusable assets adopted regionally. Presents at MongoDB Days. Files AHA tickets.

adv.desc: Runs deep-dives that move win rates. Files structured Product feedback. Presents externally.

pri.desc: Defines global standards. White papers, premier conferences. Product consults you before scoping.
